calendar.matters:
Notice Of And Motions To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories & For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Sallie Mae, Incorporated's motion to compel responses to post-judgment interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $290 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
